{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Nine-Light Mirror
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Nine-Light Mirror]] is a technique that conjures a circle of [[royal madra]] which catches and returns techniques stronger.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
